description: Comprehensive library of 40+ slide layout patterns for diverse, high-quality compositions

patterns.name: 3-Step Process
patterns.structure: header + 3 equal cards (270×300) + arrows between

patterns.name: 4-Step Process
patterns.structure: header + 4 equal cards (195×280) + arrows between

patterns.name: 5-Step Process
patterns.structure: header + 5 narrow cards (155×260) + arrows between

patterns.name: Vertical Process Flow
patterns.structure: Left timeline + 4-5 horizontal step cards stacked

patterns.name: Chevron Process
patterns.structure: 4 chevron shapes in row with labels inside

patterns.name: Circular Process
patterns.structure: Center circle + 4-6 items arranged around it with connectors

grid.description: Equal-sized card grids for comparison or listing

patterns.name: 2×2 Grid
patterns.structure: 4 equal cards (420×190) in 2 rows

patterns.name: 3-Column Single Row
patterns.structure: 3 tall cards (270×380) side by side

patterns.name: 3×2 Grid
patterns.structure: 6 cards (270×185) in 2 rows of 3

patterns.name: 4-Column Single Row
patterns.structure: 4 cards (205×360) side by side

patterns.name: 4×2 Grid
patterns.structure: 8 small cards (205×185) in 2 rows of 4

patterns.name: Icon Grid 3×2
patterns.structure: 6 icon+title+description blocks in 2 rows

patterns.name: 60/40 Split
patterns.structure: Left main (520px) + Right sidebar (340px)

patterns.name: 70/30 Split
patterns.structure: Left wide (600px) + Right narrow (260px)

patterns.name: 30/70 Split (Reverse)
patterns.structure: Left sidebar (260px) + Right main (600px)

patterns.name: 40/30/30 Triple
patterns.structure: Left featured (340px) + 2 smaller (255px each)

patterns.name: 50/25/25 Feature + Details
patterns.structure: Left large card (430px) + 2 small stacked (210px×190 each)

patterns.name: KPI Row + Detail
patterns.structure: Top: 4 KPI cards (205×80) | Bottom: large content area (880×300)

patterns.name: Chart + Sidebar
patterns.structure: Left: chart (560×380) | Right: 3-4 stat cards (290×90 each)

patterns.name: Quad Dashboard
patterns.structure: 4 equal panels (420×190): 2 charts + 2 tables

patterns.name: Scorecard Dashboard
patterns.structure: Top: 3 large KPIs (270×120) | Bottom: horizontal bar chart (880×240)

patterns.name: VS Comparison
patterns.structure: Left panel (420×380) vs Right panel (420×380) with divider

patterns.name: Before/After
patterns.structure: Left (problem/before) red-tinted + Right (solution/after) green-tinted

patterns.name: 3-Option Comparison
patterns.structure: 3 vertical panels (270×380) with checkmarks/crosses

patterns.name: 2×2 Matrix
patterns.structure: Axis labels + 4 quadrants with content in each

patterns.name: Nested Cards
patterns.structure: Large container (860×360) with 3-4 inner cards

patterns.name: Tree/Org Chart
patterns.structure: Top: 1 parent | Middle: 3-4 children | Connectors between

patterns.name: 3-Level Pyramid
patterns.structure: Top narrow (200px) + Middle medium (400px) + Bottom wide (600px)

patterns.name: Stacked Layers
patterns.structure: 4-5 horizontal bars stacked with labels and values

patterns.name: Numbered List + Card
patterns.structure: Left: numbered items (500px) + Right: summary card (360px)

patterns.name: Multi-Column Bullets
patterns.structure: 3 bullet columns (270px each) with category headers

patterns.name: Callout + Sidebar
patterns.structure: Left: large callout/quote card (540px) + Right: supporting bullets (320px)

patterns.name: Horizontal Timeline
patterns.structure: Line across middle + 4-5 milestones above/below alternating

patterns.name: Full-Width Table
patterns.structure: Description text (880×40) + full-width table (880×340)

patterns.name: Fact Sheet
patterns.structure: Left: key-value pairs list + Right: supporting data/chart

patterns.name: Hero Statement + Grid
patterns.structure: Top: large statement text (880×60) + Bottom: 3 cards (270×300)

patterns.name: KPI + Detail Explanation
patterns.structure: Left: 2 large KPI (420×180 each) + Right: detail card (420×380)

patterns.name: Infographic Row
patterns.structure: 5 icon-stat pairs (160×200) in a row with connecting line below

patterns.name: Waterfall Steps
patterns.structure: 4 descending blocks left-to-right with arrows

patterns.name: Hub and Spoke
patterns.structure: Center large card + 4-6 surrounding smaller cards with connectors

patterns.name: Accordion Stack
patterns.structure: 4-5 expandable rows full-width with title + content
